prompt:
[Person] Follows Image 1 and Image 2. Change outfit to light travel wear and change pose to a vibrant and joyful travel pose in a medium close-up shot. Only one person appears.

Create a realistic design for a 'souvenir magnet' against world travel landmarks. The person is positioned in front of a landmark representing a travel destination; this is not a photo but an actual handcrafted refrigerator magnet. The shape follows the landmark silhouette rather than a geometric shape. The name of the city or area is written at the bottom of the magnet.

[Signature] Small Meta Threads logo in the bottom right with white script signature "CHAse".
